name: health-tools
description: Personal health report analysis — a protocol that turns a folder of medical reports into a traceable extraction, trends, finding interlinks, and a self-contained offline HTML dashboard. Informational only, never diagnostic.

plugins.name: health-report-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze medical reports (labs, imaging, ECG/Echo/TMT, prescriptions, eye) into a traceable extraction, trends, interlinks, and an offline dashboard a non-medical person can understand. Never diagnoses; keeps all data local.
